chunks.text:
H. No. 3745 / 57 OG No. 10, 1738 (March 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2853, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF AÃGARIAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUGALLON, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF AÃGARIAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Añgarian in the Municipality of Bugallon, Province of Pangasinan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Añgarian.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
